description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular toolbox with a hard, orange outer shell and a deep, black interior compartment. The lid is attached with robust hinges and features two prominent latches on the front for secure closure. The exterior is reinforced with molded ridges and rounded corners, providing extra durability and impact resistance. The interior is a single, open compartment without visible trays or dividers, designed to hold a variety of tools or equipment. The latches and hinges are integrated into the shell, and the box appears to be weather-resistant, suitable for outdoor or garage use. No visible branding or external labels are present on the surface.
description: A sturdy orange toolbox with a hard shell, black interior, and secure front latches. It features a single large compartment and reinforced exterior for durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, black interior compartment, and both orange latches clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid open, highlighting the hinge mechanism and the depth of the interior compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lid closed, displaying the reinforced ridges and rounded corners of the orange shell.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid open, showing the hinge and the seamless connection between lid and base.
attribute_handle_type: Integrated fixed plastic handle, rectangular and molded into the lid for ergonomic grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front plastic clasp latches, snap-type, integrated into the shell with no visible keyhole or lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment with no visible trays, bins, or dividers; open layout.
